title: Event Alerts Integration
description: A plugin to integrate your server with the Event Alerts ecosystem
body:
# Event Alerts Integration
A plugin that alerts you when a Minecraft event happens and offers other integrations with the Event Alerts ecosystem

Join the [Event Alerts Discord](https://discord.gg/a2dUruRWQj) to learn more!

## Features
- Configurable (with filters) in-game notifications for events:
  - Skeppy events
  - Famous events (Karl, MrBeast, etc...)
  - Money events ($5+ USD)
  - Hypixel events
  - Civilization events
  - And more!
- Teleport button to take you to an event's server
- Require players to have a linked Event Alerts account to join your server
  - Use commands such as `/ea linking discord <player>` to get the Discord account of the specified player
- Prevent cross-banned (from Event Alerts) players from joining your server

## Bugs / Suggestions
If you have any bugs to report or suggestions to give, join our [Development Discord server](https://discord.gg/74YsfVuEde) and let us know in the appropriate channels!
